meaning: adj.幻想的,奇异的,稀奇古怪的,荒谬的,空想的
examples: I have a fantastic social life.
The teams served up some fantastic entertainment.
That looks like a fantastic price, given that Consolidated Edison trades at 9 times Ebitda.
He's had a fantastic time here and he'll give 100% every time he wears that shirt.
